_comment: Copy this file to verifier_config.json to override defaults. All fields optional.
_helo_hostname_comment: Domain the prober identifies itself as (HELO/EHLO + MAIL FROM). Defaults to this machine's hostname. The prober never sends DATA (no email is ever transmitted), so setting this to a domain you own is safe for that domain's sending reputation - only the probing IP accumulates any reputation signal.
